evals.prompt: goal - write a goal for yourself to improve /Users/kosta/.config/skillshare/skills/meta-tools/example-skill on plugin-eval score and trigger precision, max 20 runs or until plateau, and benchmark every iteration
evals.expected_output: Creates or drafts a Codex goal, defines target/metrics/max runs/plateau, sets up a run log, and refuses to edit canonical source before baseline.

evals.prompt: Use /goal to keep improving this Codex skill for 3 hours. Stop if the eval score stops improving and give me a benchmark table at the end.
evals.expected_output: Translates the request into a bounded goal with a wall-clock budget, plateau rule, baseline, metrics.jsonl, and final benchmark report.

evals.prompt: Please make this SKILL.md a little clearer and fix the typo.
evals.expected_output: Does not trigger a self-evolution loop; treats this as a normal one-shot edit unless the user asks for metrics or repeated improvement.

evals.prompt: Improve my PowerPoint plugin based on plugin-eval. Keep trying candidates, but don't sync Skillshare or push until I review the winner.
evals.expected_output: Runs a sandboxed candidate loop, uses plugin-eval findings as the brief, preserves canonical source until final review, and records benchmark evidence.
